description.short: Work with Azure DevOps work items, repos, pipelines, and boards from Copilot Cowork.
description.full: Azure DevOps for Copilot Cowork connects Microsoft 365 Copilot Cowork to the Azure DevOps remote MCP server for the '{{ORGANIZATION}}' organization and '{{PROJECT}}' project, so users can query and update work items, pull requests, pipelines, and boards using natural language.

agentConnectors.description: Remote MCP server for the Azure DevOps '{{ORGANIZATION}}' organization.
